_obsolete_reason: Group-MMS routing was retired in Phase 2 of the 1:1 SMS pivot. Rewrite required for Phase 7.
description: Planner sends 4-5 messages in a row as a wall of info: destination pitch, dates, budget, lodging links, rules. Tests that agent processes multi-message monologues correctly without responding to each one individually or getting confused by the sequence. Based on Bri's Shasta opening and Caroline's Tulum pitch.

messages.body: Hey
Bri - Lake Shasta
Nikki
Farah
Hannah
that's everyone
Hello friends! This is the crew that completed the Shasta houseboat interest survey approximately 4 months ago (+ a few I'm adding back in the hopes that momentum might encourage participation)
messages._note: MONOLOGUE MSG 1: context-setting. No decision content — agent should not respond

messages.body: Based on responses, September seemed to be our best bet. Checked on availability with Holiday Harbors (which Nick + Amanda used) and seems like there is still good availability
messages._note: MONOLOGUE MSG 2: references prior survey + vendor. Contains month preference but no exact dates

messages.body: I'd like to propose the weekend of 9/12 - like this if interested!
messages._note: MONOLOGUE MSG 3: actual date proposal (Sep 12). Agent should detect this one as the date

messages.body: Price pp will depend on exact #s but it looks to be less than $200 pp for the weekend for the boat (+ whatever it costs for gas for boat / transit there / food, etc.)
messages._note: MONOLOGUE MSG 4: budget info. Agent should extract ~$200pp

messages.body: In the offseason they say minimum three nights but I feel like we could still pay for three nights and do two if preferred? Can confirm if helpful!
messages._note: MONOLOGUE MSG 5: logistics detail about minimum stay. No decision needed from group

messages.body: It will be somewhat rustic - but here are the boats if you want to check it out
https://lakeshasta.com/houseboats/
messages._note: MONOLOGUE MSG 7: URL shared. Agent should ignore links

messages.body: Amanda noted these boats weren't as fancy as some others but they have better reviews as does the harbor
Feel free to leave the chat if not interested or not free!
messages._note: MONOLOGUE MSG 9: opt-out instruction. Agent should NOT treat this as the planner leaving

messages.body: Bless you Bri for being an organizer. Also love the use of rustic
messages._note: Compliment — not a date vote or trip decision

messages.body: A Bri bday boat I c u
bri you planning rockstar. i'm sadly out for the first two wks for sept!
Also flexible weekend of 9/5 if better
messages._note: SECOND DATE OPTION: planner adding alternative. Agent should track both 9/12 and 9/5

messages.body: STATUS
messages._note: Status check: should show destination (Lake Shasta), two date options, ~$200pp budget, and any constraints
